name: aQuickRescue
description: Emergency Health Data Access Platform - FHIR & Audit Compliant

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=packages/frontend && npm install --workspace=packages/shared
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace=packages/shared
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run lint:fix --workspace=packages/shared
